title: Grid Single Select with Other + NA
description: This is a Single Select Grid question with one Other box and one None option (Exclusive over the Grid)

title: Rank to 5 options with Other
description: Question for Rank to 5 options with Other specify box

title: Repeat Header in Grid
description: Repeating the header if there are too many options(Responses) in the Grid Question.

title: Check Sequential answers in Text Grid
description: This is to check if the answers are in sequence or not in a multi-text grid.

title: Rank up to 5 with other specify and exclusive options.
description: Rank up to 5 Responses with other Specify Option and exclusive options in a Grid.

title: Age Screening Using DOB (Text Input). Under 18 Termination
description: Calculates respondent age from a DOB stored as text (DD/MM/YYYY) and terminates the interview if age is below 18.

title: PRF section
description: PRF section is patient profile section shown in loop for atleast 3 patients. PRF section questions can vary from project to project.
questionType: PRF loop with block of questions (SA, MA, OE, Grid)
projectName: 25-078939-01-01 AZ HCC Himalaya ATU W13 2026 Q1

title: Tooltip / Hover text
description: Tooltip is a small, contextual message box that appears when hover over text or tapping on text. It can be used on any type of question.

title: Numeric Total to 100%
description: Numeric Total to 100%, Show auto sum at bottom of column.
